race.comment: The Price/Kent team could not have hoped to find a more suitable race for LET LILY LOOSE (13). Beat home all bar Watersports - who then went on to win the G3 Blue Sapphire - on debut and the jumpouts since have been more than adequate for a daughter of Savabeel. She's drawn out, but that should provide a nice flowing run and expect her to be strong late. Hard to sort out the rest. SUPER DIRTY (10) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was beaten 4.5 lengths when sixth in a 1200m contest at Echuca. Peak fitness now and draws the inside. PATRIOT WOLF (8) should also be ready after two runs back from a good draw. Missed the placings two starts back when resuming then ran a better race and finished 2.75 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1400m at Cranbourne. SOME CHANCE (14) has a wide gate to overcome but might have more upside than most. CAPE RADSTOCK (11) closed off OK first-up and can progress here.
